CustomField.formula: IF(OR( OR(One_time_Credit_Yr1__c < 0, One_time_Credit_Yr2__c < 0, One_time_Credit_Yr3__c < 0, One_time_Credit_Yr4__c < 0, One_time_Credit_Yr5__c < 0, One_time_Credit_Yr6__c < 0), Total_Subscription_Fees_1st_Year__c <> Year_1_Subscription_Fees_With_Adjustment__c), true, false)
CustomField.label: Display OTC and Adj amounts
